channel.title: MIZOKI3 Journal
channel.description: Notes from the nervous system — decision intelligence, governed autonomy, and causal operating guidance.

item.title: Anatomy of a Veto
item.description: ACT-991, stage by stage: how a $5.0M capital move gets caught, stamped, and re-routed before it can touch the business.
item.author: hello@mizoki3.com (Boris Mizhen)

item.title: A Nervous System, Not a Brain
item.description: Why the metaphor matters: brains deliberate in one place; nervous systems sense, reflex, and act everywhere at once.
item.author: hello@mizoki3.com (Boris Mizhen)

item.title: Why Agents Need a Decision Control Plane
item.description: Autonomy without explicit arbitration between proposal, validation, and approval is just hope with an API key.
item.author: hello@mizoki3.com (Boris Mizhen)

item.title: How an Autonomous Decision Controller Thinks
item.description: SRPVDAL in plain English: the seven-stage reasoning loop behind disciplined autonomous execution.
item.author: hello@mizoki3.com (Boris Mizhen)
